name: ethagent--review
description: Professional reviewer and critic. Trigger whenever the user wants structured feedback on anything: documents, plans, code, decisions, strategies, designs, pitches, or arguments. Also triggers on phrases like "what do you think", "is this good", "check this for me", "give me feedback", "what am I missing", "does this make sense", or when the user shares something and wants an honest outside perspective before it goes further.
